---
title: "AntSciHub"
---

Welcome to AntSciHub v4

Currently trying this out as a pilot for a lab notebook setup. Please excuse the dust 🏗️

# Templates

| Template | Description |
|---|---|
| [Research Project Template](Templates/Research%20Project%20Components/Research%20Project%20Template.qmd) | Starter structure for research project notes, data, analysis, methods, and references. |
